mapper.select: SELECT a.id as id, a.review_order_number as reviewOrderNumber, a.apply_user as applyUser, a.apply_time as applyTime, a.adjust_type as adjustType, a.currency as currency, a.adjust_amount as adjustAmount, a.remark as remark, first_review_time as firstReviewTime, first_reviewer as firstReviewer, review_remark as reviewRemark, s.site_name as siteName, s.site_code as siteCode, s.company as company, s.site_type as siteType, s.`status` as status, s.site_admin_account as siteAdminAccount, s.remark as siteRemark FROM site_security_adjust_review a LEFT JOIN site_info s ON a.site_code = s.site_code where a.id =#{id}
